initial_candidates.sql:
WITH customer_returns AS (
    SELECT 
        wr_returning_customer_sk,
        ca_state,
        SUM(wr_return_amt) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM web_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON web_returns.wr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON web_returns.wr_returning_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
    WHERE date_dim.d_year = 2002
      AND customer_address.ca_state = 'GA'
    GROUP BY wr_returning_customer_sk, ca_state
),
state_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        ca_state,
        AVG(ctr_total_return) AS state_avg_return
    FROM customer_returns
    GROUP BY ca_state
)
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_salutation,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
    c.c_birth_day,
    c.c_birth_month,
    c.c_birth_year,
    c.c_birth_country,
    c.c_login,
    c.c_email_address,
    c.c_last_review_date_sk,
    cr.ctr_total_return
FROM customer_returns cr
JOIN state_avg sa ON cr.ca_state = sa.ca_state
JOIN customer c ON cr.wr_returning_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
WHERE cr.ctr_total_return > 1.2 * sa.state_avg_return
ORDER BY c.c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

state_avg AS (

FROM customer_returns cr
JOIN state_avg sa ON cr.ca_state = sa.ca_state
JOIN customer c ON cr.wr_returning_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
WHERE cr.ctr_total_return > 1.2 * sa.state_avg_return

WITH state_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        ca_state,
        AVG(ctr_total_return) AS state_avg_return
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            wr_returning_customer_sk,
            ca_state,
            SUM(wr_return_amt) AS ctr_total_return
        FROM web_returns
        JOIN date_dim ON wr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
        JOIN customer_address ON wr_returning_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
        WHERE d_year = 2002
        GROUP BY wr_returning_customer_sk, ca_state
    ) AS customer_returns
    WHERE ca_state = 'GA'
    GROUP BY ca_state
),
customer_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        wr_returning_customer_sk,
        ca_state,
        SUM(wr_return_amt) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM web_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON wr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON wr_returning_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2002
    GROUP BY wr_returning_customer_sk, ca_state
)
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_salutation,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
    c.c_birth_day,
    c.c_birth_month,
    c.c_birth_year,
    c.c_birth_country,
    c.c_login,
    c.c_email_address,
    c.c_last_review_date_sk,
    ct.ctr_total_return
FROM customer_totals ct
JOIN customer c ON ct.wr_returning_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN state_avg sa ON ct.ca_state = sa.ca_state
WHERE ct.ca_state = 'GA'
  AND ct.ctr_total_return > 1.2 * sa.state_avg_return
ORDER BY c.c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

WITH state_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        ca_state,
        AVG(ctr_total_return) AS state_avg_return
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            wr_returning_customer_sk,
            ca_state,
            SUM(wr_return_amt) AS ctr_total_return
        FROM web_returns
        JOIN date_dim ON wr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
        JOIN customer_address ON wr_returning_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
        WHERE d_year = 2002
        GROUP BY wr_returning_customer_sk, ca_state
    ) AS customer_returns
    GROUP BY ca_state
),
high_return_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        wr_returning_customer_sk,
        ca_state,
        SUM(wr_return_amt) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM web_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON wr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON wr_returning_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2002
    GROUP BY wr_returning_customer_sk, ca_state
)
SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_salutation,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
    c.c_birth_day,
    c.c_birth_month,
    c.c_birth_year,
    c.c_birth_country,
    c.c_login,
    c.c_email_address,
    c.c_last_review_date_sk,
    hrc.ctr_total_return
FROM high_return_customers hrc
JOIN customer c ON hrc.wr_returning_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN state_averages sa ON hrc.ca_state = sa.ca_state
WHERE hrc.ca_state = 'GA'
  AND hrc.ctr_total_return > 1.2 * sa.state_avg_return
ORDER BY c.c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

WITH state_avg AS (
    SELECT

          AND ca_state = 'GA'
        GROUP BY wr_returning_customer_sk, ca_state

    JOIN date_dim ON wr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk

SELECT 
    c.c_customer_id,

    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name,
    c.c_preferred_cust_flag,
    c.c_birth_day,
    c.c_birth_month,
    c.c_birth_year,
    c.c_birth_country,
    c.c_login,
    c.c_email_address,
    c.c_last_review_date_sk,
    cr.ctr_total_return
FROM customer_returns cr
JOIN customer c ON cr.wr_returning_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN state_avg sa ON cr.ca_state = sa.ca_state
WHERE cr.ctr_total_return > 1.2 * sa.state_avg_return
